serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/connections
serverInfo.title: connections
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the connections service.

tools.name: RetrieveConnectionOfSpace
tools.title: RetrieveConnectionOfSpace
tools.description: Returns the definition of a connection in a space (without its credentials).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The technical name of the connection

tools.name: UpdateConnectionInSpace
tools.title: UpdateConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Updates a connection in a space.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The technical name of the connection

tools.name: DeleteConnectionInSpace
tools.title: DeleteConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Deletes a connection from a space.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The technical name of the connection

tools.name: ValidateConnectionInSpace
tools.title: ValidateConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Validates a connection in a space.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The technical name of the connection

tools.name: ListConnectionsInSpace
tools.title: ListConnectionsInSpace
tools.description: Returns a list of connections available in a space.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Requests that the service returns only the connections' technical names.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Requests that the service returns the connections with all their details except for credentials.

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Requests that the service returns the connections with their technical names and their information about enabled and disabled features.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Specifies a value N that limits the number of items returned.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Specifies a value N that excludes the first N items.

tools.name: CreateConnectionInSpace
tools.title: CreateConnectionInSpace
tools.description: Creates a connection in a space.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description: The Space ID to create an SAP SuccessFactors connection

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: The ID of the connection type
